meta.title: TP Club | Crypto Education Community for Chinese Australians
meta.description: Join TP Club — Australia's Mandarin crypto education community. Free Telegram access, daily market learning, Bitunix onboarding support, and 500+ active learners.

compliance: Education only — no financial advice, no guaranteed profits, and TP Club never manages your funds.

hero.sub: Join a Mandarin-first crypto education room built for Chinese Australians: daily BTC/USDT context, risk-first lessons, Bitunix onboarding support, and a private Telegram community that learns together.
hero.caption: Educational community · Telegram-first support · No monthly fee
deskItems: How to read trend structure before entering a trade
How funding, volatility, and risk limits affect beginners
How to set up Bitunix without giving anyone account access

how.title: How to Get Started
how.sub: Three simple steps to join our education community

steps.d: Click our exclusive referral link to open a free account on Bitunix — our trusted partner exchange. Takes less than 5 minutes. Zero experience needed.
Deposit to your own Bitunix account to activate your trading access. This is your money, in your own account — we never access or manage it.
Screenshot your Bitunix sign-up confirmation and send it to our Telegram team. We verify and add you to the private education group immediately.

bundle.title: Your Complete Member Bundle
bundle.sub: Everything below is included FREE when you join via our Bitunix referral link

items.d: TP Club's proprietary market indicator built to help members learn how to read trends and market conditions.
Daily market breakdowns from our educator — learn to understand what's happening in crypto and why.
Ask questions inside the Telegram group and learn from instructor updates, member discussions, and shared market context.
Join 500+ active learners sharing insights, market observations, and educational discussions.
Video lessons, walkthroughs, and step-by-step guides to build your crypto knowledge from absolute beginner level.
Learn how to protect your capital, size positions responsibly, and develop safe trading habits from day one.

instructor.label: Meet Your Educator
instructor.name: TP Club Instructor
instructor.role: Lead Educator & Community Founder · TP Club
instructor.bio: With years of hands-on experience in crypto markets, our lead educator has helped hundreds of Chinese-Australian investors understand the crypto space confidently. Teaching complex market concepts in plain Mandarin and English — no jargon, no hype.

items.name: Li Wei
items.text: 加入TP Club是我做过最好的决定。老师讲解得非常清楚，即使是零基础也能理解。Bitunix注册也很简单，五分钟就搞定了。强烈推荐！

items.name: Zhang Mei
items.text: 澳大利亚很难找到中文的加密货币教育资源，TP Club完美填补了这个空白。老师的分析让我真正明白了市场是怎么运作的。

items.name: David Chen
items.text: I was new to crypto and had no idea where to start. The step-by-step Bitunix setup guide was super clear, and the education group is incredibly helpful. Great community!

youtube.title: Subscribe for TP Club Lessons
youtube.sub: Watch market education clips, beginner walkthroughs, and community updates before your next Telegram discussion.

cta.title: Ready to Start Learning?
cta.sub: Join 500+ learners in Telegram for market education, beginner support, and community discussions.
cta.note: No monthly fee. Education only. Free bundle included with Bitunix sign-up.

items.q: Is this free? What do I need to pay?
items.a: Joining TP Club is completely free. To receive the full education bundle, you register on Bitunix via our referral link and fund your own personal account. There are no monthly fees charged by us.

items.q: Is this a scam? Is it safe?
items.a: We operate with full transparency — our educator shares market analysis live in the group, you keep full control of your own Bitunix account at all times, and we never ask for your login credentials or access to your funds.

items.q: Why do I need to register on Bitunix?
items.a: Bitunix is our partner exchange. When you sign up via our referral link, Bitunix pays us a small referral commission — this is how we can offer all education resources free to you.

No. TP Club is an educational community. All market analysis, indicators, and content are for learning purposes only. We do not provide personalised financial advice, investment recommendations, account management, or guaranteed results. Cryptocurrency trading involves significant risk of loss, so only trade with money you can afford to lose.

items.q: I'm completely new to crypto. Can I still join?
items.a: Absolutely — beginners are welcome! Our content is designed for people with zero prior experience. We explain everything from how to set up your account to understanding basic market concepts.
Join the Telegram group and ask inside the community. The group is the main place for TP Club updates, beginner support, and education discussions.

footer.disclaimer: Important: TP Club is an educational community. All market analysis and content are for learning purposes only and do not constitute financial advice, investment recommendations, brokerage services, account management, or promises of profit. Cryptocurrency trading involves significant risk of loss. You keep control of your own exchange account, and TP Club will never ask for your password, seed phrase, private keys, or access to funds.
footer.copyright: © 2025 TP Club. All rights reserved. · Educational content only.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TP Club keeps data collection minimal. This page explains what we collect when you contact us, join Telegram, or complete the education onboarding flow.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.body: We may receive your name, Telegram handle, email address, and screenshots you voluntarily send for Bitunix referral verification. We do not ask for exchange passwords, seed phrases, private keys, or access to your funds.

sections.title: How we use it
sections.body: We use this information to respond to enquiries, confirm community access, provide education support, improve our onboarding, and maintain records for referral attribution.

sections.title: Third-party services
sections.body: Telegram, hosting providers, Bitunix, and analytics tools may process information under their own privacy policies. Future tracking or analytics integrations will be managed from the admin area before being enabled.

sections.title: Educational disclaimer
sections.body: TP Club provides education only. We do not provide personalised financial advice, brokerage services, account management, or guaranteed trading results.

contact.title: Contact TP Club
contact.intro: Have a question before joining? Reach out through Telegram and continue the conversation inside the community.
contact.note: Never send passwords, private keys, seed phrases, or exchange login details.

admin.title: Admin Area
admin.intro: This private area is reserved for the single TP Club admin account. Management tools are planned but not enabled yet.

cards.title: Tracking Setup
cards.body: Connect or disconnect analytics, pixels, and campaign tracking tools from one place.

cards.title: Third-Party Integrations
cards.body: Manage Telegram, exchange referral, email, analytics, and future CRM integrations.

cards.title: Blog Management
cards.body: Draft, publish, and localize education articles for English and Chinese learners.

cards.title: Access Control
cards.body: Single-admin login and audit history will be added before this area becomes active.
